creator: jrhett@netconsonance.com
text:
The systems have been from Rackable C2004, dual Intel processors,
     4GB ram, scsi disk, motherboard is Tyan S2720

FWIW, problem is repeatable on SATA disk interface as well.

Keyboard is a Microsoft Natural Keyboard with a PS/2 interface,  
although I have tried a Compaq and an HP keyboard with identical  
results.   I don't have a USB keyboard handy to test with.

Swap space is 2gb, single partition in the normal space (0b)

Partition map is simple:
    2gb root
    2gb swap
    4gb var
    (*) d


I'll get the dmesg later today.
